sha_binding.verified_source_note: Implementation commit: state-aware governance brake in apps/api/src/candidate-pick-scanner.ts (resolveGovernanceBrakeAction + pickStatus-driven branch) plus the candidate-pick-scanner.test.ts coverage. The following commit touches only docs/06_status/proof, docs/06_status/lanes, and .ops/sync paths; merge SHA binds at close.

pnpm_verify.note: env:check, lint, type-check, and build all green. The only red was apps/api/src/t1-proof-awaiting-approval-review.test.ts (UTV2-521 regression, a live-DB-backed suite unrelated to this diff). It passes 5/5 in isolation (exit 0); the in-suite failure is the known prod-DB-under-load flake. This change touches only candidate-pick-scanner.

cases: resolveGovernanceBrakeAction: validated picks brake to awaiting_approval
resolveGovernanceBrakeAction: already-gated picks are idempotent (no re-transition)
resolveGovernanceBrakeAction: a pick advanced past the gate fails closed (void)
resolveGovernanceBrakeAction: terminal picks are skipped (never voided -> voided / settled -> awaiting_approval)
promoted pick carries a canonical stake_units > 0 and stays gated (UTV2-1285)

runtime_proof.note: Live Supabase smoke (zfzdnfwdarxucxtaojxm). TAP summary embedded in verification.md. Read-only; no production rows written by this lane beyond the normal pick-creation flow.

live_production_proof.observed: At verification time, system-pick-scanner picks in production were landing in awaiting_approval with zero queued/voided brake errors in the trailing 30m window — confirming the brake fix's runtime behavior and that the public delivery gate holds.
live_production_proof.deferred: A full qualified-candidate → pick proof is supply-starved: the MLB ingestor intermittently re-stalls (0 MLB offers / 0 qualified candidates in the trailing 15m), so the scanner has no fresh candidates to promote during those windows. That residual ingestion-robustness limiter is tracked separately and is out of scope for this promotion-path lane.
